unraidclaw.description: UnraidClaw API gateway — 43 tools across 11 categories: Docker, VMs, Array, Disks, Shares, System, Notifications, Network, Users, Logs, Plugins. Full Unraid server management.

filesystem.description: Read/write access scoped to NanoClaw workspace (/opt/nanoclaw/workspace -> /mnt/user/appdata/nanoclaw/workspace on host).

docker.description: Direct Docker container management via host socket. Complements UnraidClaw for low-level container ops (exec, logs, inspect).

home-assistant.description: Home Assistant REST API on Node D (192.168.1.149:8123). Smart home control, automations, sensor data, voice pipeline triggers.

brave-search.description: Brave web search (primary). Used by ORACLE for research when Qdrant RAG corpus lacks coverage.

tavily-search.description: Tavily web search (fallback). AI-optimized search with extract and context features. Activate if Brave is unavailable.

github.description: GitHub MCP server scoped to Enigmaticjoe/onemoreytry. PRs, issues, commits, releases, code search.

fetch.description: General HTTP fetching for web pages, APIs, and documentation. No auth required.

memory-sqlite.description: Persistent structured memory via local SQLite DB. Used for operator preferences, incident history, scheduled task state.

qdrant.description: Qdrant vector search on Node A. RAG corpus containing homelab docs, config files, troubleshooting history, and runbooks.
